_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values.
_comment_topic: Pick something unique — this is your private notification channel
_comment_api_key: Optional. Leave blank — public sports markets don't require it
_comment_interval: How often to check all markets (seconds). 300 = every 5 minutes
_comment_threshold: Alert when a market moves this many percentage points (e.g. 5 = alert on a 5pp move)
_comment_direction: Alert on moves in which direction: 'up', 'down', or 'both'

market_overrides._comment: Optional. Override threshold or direction for specific tickers.
market_overrides._comment2: Run  python kalshi_monitor.py --list-markets  to see all available tickers.
